title: Ekshen & Staf
description: This is the best Action & Stuff modpack in Java Minecraft
body:
### This is the best modpack for replaying Action & Stuff on Minecraft Java!


**I do not violate copyrights or steal anything; this is just a fan modpack inspired by the original. The project keeps growing, and I regularly update and improve it. Hope you enjoy it!**

The modpack carefully replicates the original **Action & Stuff** experience on Java Minecraft, bringing back the same look, feel, and atmosphere while also allowing full customization to match your own playstyle and preferences. It is built on the reliable **"Simple Optimized"** modpack as a foundation, with a few finely adjusted and modified mods to make the gameplay even smoother and closer to the original.

The modpack is very well suited for long, constant play sessions, since all unnecessary resource packs, shaders, or mods can be easily disabled without breaking the overall feel. Thanks to its optimized base, it also runs well on mid-range PCs, giving both performance and quality.

The build currently contains a total of 20 mods, 9 resource packs, and 3 shaders, carefully picked to balance visuals, mechanics, and optimization, making it ideal for both casual and more dedicated players.

_If you find a bug, or know how to improve the modpack, write in to direct in my Telegram channel! **(gareldd)**_
